content: [{"id":"b82d34a1-3241-4e4e-8d7b-dbcdb6e2734c","component":"Section","data":{"title":"Projects","subtitle":"I've contributed to or own.","align":"left","background":"none","className":""},"children":[]},{"id":"4821e0a0-ae3d-4529-aaf0-e30541cd27fe","component":"CarouselList","data":{},"children":[{"id":"2d129eab-d5c0-4110-b05a-22d60a8a150d","component":"Card","data":{"title":"PHP IL","subtitle":"C#","showFooter":false,"className":""},"children":[{"id":"c3e829ef-d5dd-4dda-bdb5-637be5e80934","component":"Text","data":{"content":"PHP-IL is an experimental PHP engine that runs PHP on the Common Language Runtime (CLR). It compiles PHP code into an intermediate language, allowing it to execute within the .NET ecosystem. This approach enables PHP applications to take advantage of the CLR’s runtime features while maintaining compatibility with standard PHP code.","tag":"p","align":"left","weight":"regular","color":"","fontSize":"","fontFamily":"Inter, sans-serif","lineHeight":"","letterSpacing":"","marginBottom":"","className":""},"children":[]},{"id":"f10fedef-5b62-4c55-b998-77e57d1634ac","component":"Anchor","data":{"url":"https://github.com/hudson1998x/PHPIL","text":"View repository","target":"_self","className":""},"children":[]}]},{"id":"a8269694-6317-4cd8-b961-a97f0d2d8625","component":"Card","data":{"title":"Socialstack","subtitle":"C#, TypeScript, SASS, NodeJS","showFooter":false,"className":""},"children":[{"id":"05ed41b8-8ad6-4c08-89f5-fd372160fb19","component":"Text","data":{"content":"Social Stack is a high-performance web framework built on Kestrel with a dependency injection first architecture. It focuses on efficient application development with features like pooled writers for low-allocation endpoints, automated TypeScript API generation, built-in SASS support, and a permissions system integrated at the core, making it a versatile platform for building modern web applications.","tag":"p","align":"left","weight":"regular","color":"","fontSize":"","fontFamily":"Inter, sans-serif","lineHeight":"","letterSpacing":"","marginBottom":"","className":""},"children":[]},{"id":"c204db03-d4c3-41f8-a59d-596888e00614","component":"Anchor","data":{"url":"https://github.com/socialstack-core/core2025/","text":"View repository","target":"_self","className":""},"children":[]}]},{"id":"44013382-843c-4a33-a337-8a91f2161445","component":"Card","data":{"title":"CodeFolio","subtitle":"TypeScript, SASS, NodeJS","showFooter":false,"className":""},"children":[{"id":"9e8789bd-7412-484e-88f2-061a7ff4581d","component":"Text","data":{"content":"CodeFolio is a git-first, local-first framework for building static websites, including portfolios, documentation, or blogs. Your content, configuration, and history live entirely in a Git repository, while the admin interface and live preview run offline. Deployment is simple; just push to GitHub Pages or any static host and your site is live without any extra infrastructure.","tag":"p","align":"left","weight":"regular","color":"","fontSize":"","fontFamily":"Inter, sans-serif","lineHeight":"","letterSpacing":"","marginBottom":"","className":""},"children":[]},{"id":"a541104d-7b6f-4577-bcff-0121b52275e8","component":"Anchor","data":{"url":"https://github.com/hudson1998x/Codefolio","text":"View Repository","target":"_self","className":""},"children":[]}]}]}]
